---
title: "GSoC 2025 Tests"
format: html
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

# 🧪 Google Summer of Code 2025 – Test Results

Welcome! This page presents the results of the easy, medium, and hard tasks completed as part of the GSoC 2025 preparatory work for the **spinebil** project.

## 📂 Test Tasks

<div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1.5rem;">

<div style="flex: 1; min-width: 250px;">
<h3>🟢 Easy Task</h3>
<p>Basic implementation and understanding of core ideas.</p>
<p><a href="articles/Easy.html" target="_blank">View Easy Task →</a></p>
</div>

<div style="flex: 1; min-width: 250px;">
<h3>🟡 Medium Task</h3>
<p>More advanced functionality showing intermediate skill.</p>
<p><a href="articles/Medium.html" target="_blank">View Medium Task →</a></p>
</div>

<div style="flex: 1; min-width: 250px;">
<h3>🔴 Hard Task</h3>
<p>Challenging work demonstrating strong technical depth.</p>
<p><a href="articles/Hard.html" target="_blank">View Hard Task →</a></p>
</div>

</div>

---

## 📬 Contact

If you'd like to know more about this project, feel free to check the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/vahdatjavad/ecotourism).

---
